title: You are main-orchestrator. Analyze the GitHub issue and return ONLY valid JSON with keys: risk (LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH), approve (boolean), findings (array of strings), recommendation (string), rationale (string). Issue Title: codex lane test Issue Body: verify no regression Return ONLY valid JSON.
summary_text: {"risk":"MEDIUM","approve":false,"findings":["Issue scope is underspecified: no feature area, commit range, or environment is identified.","No acceptance criteria or expected behavior is defined, so regression verification is not objectively measurable.","No test plan or required checks are listed (unit/integration/e2e/manual), increasing chance of missed regressions."],"recommendation":"Do not approve as-is; request concrete scope and acceptance criteria, then run a targeted regression checklist plus automated test suite for the affected area.","rationale":"The request is simple but too vague to validate reliably.
